title: helenium eupatoriodes
intro: Helenium eupatoriodes, also known as false sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to the prairies of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to treat wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various infections. Helenium eupatoriodes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
